summary: Created `src/scoring/privacy-posture.ts` with `computePrivacyPosture()` that maps an EntropyResult score to three bands: Low (0–33), Moderate (34–66), High (67–100). Each band returns an entropy label, a heuristic uniqueness estimate (using `~` prefix), and a privacy posture summary line. Extended `fingerprint-receipt.ts` to append three new ReceiptRows (Entropy Level, Uniqueness Estimate with [Heuristic] suffix, Privacy Posture) after snapshot rows, including on rerun. Updated existing US-013 and US-017 tests to expect 15 rows (12 snapshot + 3 posture). All 518 tests pass, lint and typecheck clean.
